---
title: "Research Projects"
---

## LCA-LCC Assessment of Synthetic Humic Substance (SHS) Production and Agricultural Application

### Research Focus

First-author research evaluating four hydrothermal humification technologies for Synthetic Humic Substance (SHS) production in China.

### Methods

- Life Cycle Assessment (LCA)
- Life Cycle Costing (LCC)
- Simapro
- Province-level scenario analysis

### Key Topics

- Environmental hotspot analysis
- Carbon mitigation potential
- Regional energy transition scenarios
- Agricultural application benefits

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Greenhouse Gas Inventory Analysis

### Research Focus

Applied IPCC-based greenhouse gas inventory methods to estimate emissions and analyze mitigation opportunities in environmental systems.

### Methods

- IPCC Tier 1, Tier 2, and Tier 3 methodologies
- Emission factor analysis
- Uncertainty assessment
- Scenario evaluation

### Key Topics

- Greenhouse gas accounting
- Carbon inventories
- Mitigation assessment
- Environmental data analysis

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Environmental Data Science Applications

### Research Focus

Applied quantitative and reproducible data analysis methods for sustainability and environmental research projects.

### Methods

- R and R Markdown
- Statistical analysis
- Data visualization
- Reproducible workflows

### Key Topics

- Environmental data processing
- Quantitative modeling
- Sustainability analytics
- Research reproducibility

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Construction of Chinese Food and Agriculture Biomass Input-Output (FABIO) Model

### Research Focus

Participated in research related to biomass flow accounting and environmental-economic analysis in China’s food and agricultural systems.

### Methods

- Input-output analysis
- Environmental-economic modeling
- Biomass flow accounting
- Data integration

### Key Topics

- Agricultural systems
- Biomass resource analysis
- Environmental-economic systems
- Sustainability assessment

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## ESG Evaluation Framework Research

### Research Focus

Conducted research on ESG evaluation indicators and sustainability-related corporate assessment frameworks.

### Methods

- ESG indicator analysis
- Sustainability reporting review
- Comparative framework analysis
- Policy and literature review

### Key Topics

- ESG evaluation
- Corporate sustainability
- Sustainability metrics
- Environmental governance

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Research on Green Energy Policy Effects on Wind Power Development

### Research Focus

Analyzed the relationship between renewable energy policies and wind power industry development.

### Methods

- Policy analysis
- Statistical analysis
- Economic evaluation
- Comparative analysis

### Key Topics

- Renewable energy policy
- Wind power development
- Energy transition
- Climate mitigation

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Research on Pricing Issues in China’s Downstream Natural Gas Market

### Research Focus

Studied pricing mechanisms and policy impacts in China’s downstream natural gas market.

### Methods

- Market analysis
- Economic modeling
- Policy evaluation
- Comparative analysis

### Key Topics

- Natural gas markets
- Energy economics
- Pricing mechanisms
- Energy policy

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Multi-Actor Strategic Interactions in Green Energy Policy

### Research Focus

Explored strategic interactions among governments, enterprises, and consumers under green energy policy frameworks.

### Methods

- Game theory analysis
- Policy analysis
- Environmental-economic modeling
- Scenario analysis

### Key Topics

- Green energy policy
- Strategic interaction
- Sustainability transition
- Environmental governance
